backend.baseUrlHint: API endpoint URL, e.g. https://localtagger.gpu.garden or http://localhost:8000

models.wd-swinv2-v3: Fast and balanced WD tagger. Good general-purpose default.
models.wd-eva02-large-v3: Large WD EVA02 tagger. Slower but more accurate.
models.animetimm-caformer-b36: Modern CAFormer tagger with strong overall accuracy.
models.camie-v2: Tagger with very broad tag coverage.

backend.gatedHint: Requires a Hugging Face token on the server.
backend.warmupHint: Model not loaded yet — the first request may take longer.

errors.taggerRequired: Tagger base URL is required. Please configure it in the backend settings.

info.title: What is Farterrogator?
info.description: Farterrogator is a fast, local Booru-style image tagger. It analyzes images using WD EVA 02-family and illustration-centric models to extract Danbooru-compatible tags for dataset creation and prompt engineering.

models.title: Multiple Tagger Models
models.description: Choose between WD SwinV2, WD EVA02, AnimeTimm and Camie models — plus Kaloscope artist style similarity.

naiReady.title: NAI Ready Embedding
naiReady.description: Automatically embed generated tags into PNG metadata. The resulting images are "NAI Ready" — simply drag them into NovelAI to autopopulate prompts.

privacy.title: Privacy & Performance
privacy.description: All inference runs on the configured backend (gpu.garden or local). No cloud API keys required.

gpuGarden.title: GPU Garden Integration
gpuGarden.description: Optimized for gpu.garden infrastructure with automatic CORS proxy routing.

howTo.title: How to use
howTo.step1: Upload an image or drag & drop it onto the canvas.
howTo.step2: Select a tagger model — the list is loaded from the backend.
howTo.step3: Adjust confidence thresholds to filter tags.
howTo.step5: Copy tags, or download an NAI Ready PNG.
